title: Jamaican Jerk Chicken
description: A spicy Caribbean-inspired dish with a flavorful jerk marinade. Perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine Jamaican seasoning, pepper, and 2 tbsp of water to make a smooth paste.
Rub the chicken breasts with the jerk marinade, making sure they're evenly coated.
Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, cook the crispy bacon in a pan over medium heat until crispy.
Serve the jerk chicken with stew and crispy bacon on top, if using.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
Let the chicken rest for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
